---
title: "Sports analytics"
format: html
---

Sports analytics is revolutionising sport, including football. It affects every aspect of getting the best sporting performances from a team by using statistical analysis: recruiting the best players and selecting the best team for each match, achieving peak fitness as well as on-the-field tactics -- without losing the magic of each unique and spontaneous football match.

Liverpool FC won the English Premiership in 2019/20 and in 2024/25, two of the greatest seasons ever.

## Some analysis

- [Premier league 2019/20](EPL201920.html)
